dimensions.hook_strength: Do the first 2 seconds grab attention? The punchline or peak moment is up front — no slow pan, no throat-clearing lead-in.
dimensions.pace_cut_density: Are the cuts tight and energetic? No dragging middle; momentum builds to the end.
dimensions.caption_legibility: Are on-screen captions large, high-contrast, well-timed, and readable on a phone? Not tiny, not lagging the audio.
dimensions.loopability: Does the ending flow back into the opening so the clip loops seamlessly for replays?
dimensions.on_style_trend_fit: Does it match current Viral Short conventions — pacing, energy, framing, trend fit for 9:16 short-form?
